per_iteration.notes: Baseline. git-log-analyze failed because model wrote git_report.json inside project/ subdirectory instead of workspace root.

per_iteration.changes: Added output file placement guidance, condensed skill to focus on history analysis and branch operations with concrete commands.
per_iteration.notes: git-log-analyze fixed. git-branch-ops failed due to index.lock race conditions and model forgetting to cd into repo dir.

per_iteration.changes: Added critical rules section: (1) remove stale lock files before git ops, (2) always chain with cd, (3) run operations in single bash call to avoid lock races. Showed cherry-pick with variable chaining pattern.

key_changes: Added CRITICAL RULES section addressing output file placement, cd chaining, lock file cleanup, and command batching
Replaced generic git reference with task-focused commands for history analysis and branch/tag operations
Reduced skill size from 430 lines to ~70 lines of focused, actionable content
